hooks.command: echo RED-TEAM GATE active - before any affirmation, number, or answer run the Tier-0 self-check 1 power-and-CI 2 maximand-vs-objective 3 sample-vs-inference 4 measured-vs-assumed - if any is shaky AND the claim is load-bearing, escalate to the full 3-agent review via the redteam skill - canonical protocol in RED_TEAM_PROTOCOL.md
